description: Categories for normalized terminology extracted from bylaw source text.

entries.label: Dwelling type
entries.description: A residential dwelling form or residential occupancy type.

entries.label: Use type
entries.description: A land use, activity, establishment, facility, or occupancy type.

entries.label: Lot context
entries.description: A lot condition or context such as interior lot, corner lot, flankage, or water lot.

entries.label: Yard type
entries.description: A required yard, setback, or yard-related location.

entries.label: Building element
entries.description: A building, structure, feature, projection, or physical building component.

entries.label: Approval process
entries.description: A permit, agreement, variance, plan, site-plan approval, or other approval process.

entries.label: Map feature
entries.description: A mapped feature, mapped designation, schedule feature, boundary, or mapped constraint.

entries.label: Document reference
entries.description: A reference to a bylaw part, section, clause, table, appendix, schedule, definition, or external document.

entries.label: Zone
entries.description: A zoning district, zone code, or zone class.

entries.label: Parking and loading
entries.description: A parking, loading, driveway, access, or circulation term.

entries.label: Signage
entries.description: A sign, sign type, sign structure, or signage-related term.

entries.label: Environmental feature
entries.description: A watercourse, water lot, storm surge, buffer, landscape, conservation, or environmental constraint term.

entries.label: Unknown
entries.description: A term category that has not yet been classified.
